criteria: RSP rank significantly above market ADP, Underrated (U) tag, Sleeper (Z) tag, or WW value with Tier C+ rank
leagueContext: TheLeague uses tiered PPR (TE 1.0, WR 0.5, RB 0.25) and 6pt passing TDs

sleepers.name: Myles Montgomery
sleepers.comparison: Cadillac Williams - Kenny Gainwell - Jeff Wilson
sleepers.sleepReason: RSP's pick as the MOST UNDERRATED skill talent in the 2026 class. RB4 grade but likely UDFA. Massive disconnect between talent and draft capital. Hula Bowl standout.
sleepers.actionPlan: Add from waivers immediately after draft if undrafted. If gets Day 3 capital, worth a late-round rookie draft pick. Monitor training camp reports closely.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: Pure runner -- not a receiving back -- which actually HELPS in TheLeague's 0.25 RB PPR format since we don't overpay for catches. His rushing talent is what matters.

sleepers.name: Emmett Johnson
sleepers.comparison: Dalvin Cook - Devonta Freeman - Duke Johnson - Jordan James
sleepers.sleepReason: RB2 on RSP's board but pre-draft trajectory mirrors Harold Fannin Jr.'s from the 2025 class (who was a massive RSP hit). Underrated tag. May be available in rounds 3-4 of rookie drafts.
sleepers.actionPlan: Target in round 3-4 of rookie draft if available. If undrafted in NFL, add from waivers. Dalvin Cook comparison is elite.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: Cook comp suggests dual-threat back, but at 0.25 RB PPR in TheLeague, his receiving value is muted. Still elite talent grade.

sleepers.name: Robert Henry Jr.
sleepers.comparison: Aaron Jones - Eric Metcalf - Nyheim Hines
sleepers.sleepReason: Small school RB with Tier A grade. Aaron Jones comparison is extremely valuable. Underrated tag. Likely not on league's radar at all.
sleepers.actionPlan: Monitor NFL Draft capital. If gets Day 3 pick, target in mid-rounds of rookie draft. If UDFA, waiver wire add.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: Aaron Jones comp includes receiving value that's diminished at 0.25 PPR. Still, Jones was an elite rusher too.

sleepers.name: Jamal Haynes
sleepers.sleepReason: Former slot receiver converted to RB. Chris Johnson comparison for speed. Underrated tag with Tier A grade. Late-round value before NFL Draft.
sleepers.actionPlan: Worth late-round rookie draft pick now. Could earn higher value after landing spot.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: Chris Johnson comp is pure rushing value -- excellent in TheLeague's 0.25 RB PPR system.

sleepers.name: Davon Booth
sleepers.comparison: Dalvin Cook/J.K. Dobbins - Khalil Herbert/Kyle Monangai
sleepers.sleepReason: Sleeper tag. Another hidden talent in this RB class who could become productive. Dalvin Cook/J.K. Dobbins comparison tier is elite. If earns Day Three capital, fantasy value jumps.
sleepers.actionPlan: Monitor NFL Draft. If earns early Day Three capital, consider in mid-rounds.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: Dobbins/Herbert comp suggests power-rushing value -- great in TheLeague format.

sleepers.name: Leshon Williams
sleepers.comparison: James Robinson - Ke-Shawn Vaughn/Tashard Choice - Javorius Allen
sleepers.sleepReason: Underrated tag. Rotational Starter grade but will likely be UDFA or 6th-7th round. James Robinson comp is a notable UDFA-to-starter precedent.
sleepers.actionPlan: Worth a late-round rookie draft pick. James Robinson went undrafted and became an RB1 -- same path could apply.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: Robinson comp is a between-the-tackles grinder -- perfect for TheLeague's rushing-first RB format.

sleepers.name: Kaelon Black
sleepers.comparison: J.K. Dobbins - Sean Tucker - Jordan James
sleepers.sleepReason: Sleeper tag. Smart runner with cutback ability and downhill ferocity. Rotational Starter grade. Patience play.
sleepers.actionPlan: Patience play -- could pop if training camp injuries clear a path. Worth a late stash.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: Dobbins comp is pure rushing value -- excellent in 0.25 RB PPR.

sleepers.name: Kejon Owens
sleepers.comparison: J.K. Dobbins - Sean Tucker - Jordan James/Kaelon Black
sleepers.sleepReason: Underrated AND Sleeper tags. Won't have NFL Draft capital but RSP has him as a legitimate Contributor. Free waiver wire add after draft.
sleepers.actionPlan: Free acquisition. Add from waivers after draft. No draft capital means zero cost.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: At $425K minimum salary, the cap hit is negligible for a C-tier talent.

sleepers.name: Eric McAlister
sleepers.comparison: George Pickens - Chris Henry/Ja'Kobi Lane - Justin Hunter
sleepers.sleepReason: High ceiling with excellent length, good speed, and acrobatic ability. Will likely have LOWER NFL Draft capital than skills suggest -- buy-low opportunity.
sleepers.actionPlan: Buy low in mid-to-late rounds of rookie draft. George Pickens comp at a discount price.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: At 0.5 WR PPR, his value is more dependent on yards and TDs than volume catches -- fits well for a big-play WR.

sleepers.name: Junior Vandeross III
sleepers.comparison: Wan'Dale Robinson - Greg Dortch - Keke Coutee
sleepers.sleepReason: Sleeper tag. Rotational Starter grade but from Toledo -- no Combine invite. Slot receiver with big-play potential likely available as free agent.
sleepers.actionPlan: Monitor NFL Draft capital. If earns draft capital inside Day 3, worth a mid-round stash. If UDFA, waiver add.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: Slot receiver profile is slightly devalued at 0.5 WR PPR vs full PPR. But Rotational Starter grade is rare for a potential free pickup.

sleepers.name: Bryce Lance
sleepers.sleepReason: Trey Lance's younger brother from NDSU. A.J. Green high-end comparison with Rotational Starter grade. Must-draft in leagues with 35+ roster spots. Small school pedigree will suppress market price.
sleepers.actionPlan: Must-draft in leagues with 35+ roster spots. For smaller rosters, target in late rounds.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: A.J. Green comp is a big-play WR profile -- yards and TDs matter more than catches at 0.5 PPR, which works.

sleepers.name: Carsen Ryan
sleepers.sleepReason: Most puzzling Combine snub per Waldman. Underrated tag. TE5 grade with Jake Ferguson comparison but likely available in final rounds of rookie drafts.
sleepers.actionPlan: Target in final rounds of rookie draft. At $425K salary with TE premium scoring in TheLeague (1.0 PPR), this is maximum value.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: TheLeague's full 1.0 PPR for TEs makes this a premium value. Jake Ferguson comp is a TE1 in our scoring system. At minimum salary this is the epitome of salary cap arbitrage.

sleepers.name: Riley Nowakowski
sleepers.comparison: Josiah Deguara - Hunter Bryant - Charlie Taumoepeau
sleepers.sleepReason: Underrated tag. Walk-on converted from linebacker. Exceptional situational value. Likely available as free agent.
sleepers.actionPlan: Free acquisition if UDFA. Worth monitoring for training camp breakout.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: Full 1.0 PPR for TEs in TheLeague means even modest receiving production has fantasy value.

sleepers.name: Jadarian Price
sleepers.comparison: Terrell Davis - Jonathan Franklin - Ty Chandler - George Holani
sleepers.sleepReason: Overshadowed by Jeremiyah Love at Notre Dame. Ceiling is as high as RBs 2-5 per Waldman. Terrell Davis comparison is Hall of Fame caliber. Pre-draft bump as Love's backup means market undervalues his individual talent.
sleepers.actionPlan: Target in mid-rounds of rookie draft. Love's shadow depresses Price's market value. Post-draft landing spot will be critical.
sleepers.leagueAdjustment: Terrell Davis comp is a pure rusher -- ideal for TheLeague's 0.25 RB PPR. At a rookie salary slot, this is excellent value.
